description_long: This is a two-story modern suburban house surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and landscaped garden. The front features a paved driveway with two parked cars, a covered porch, and large windows with shutters. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and several mature trees providing shade and privacy. The house has a flat roof with some rooftop access and a mix of white and light gray exterior walls. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large glass doors opening to the backyard. The property is enclosed, with a clear separation between the front driveway and the private backyard leisure area.
description: A modern two-story suburban house with a flat roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, covered porch, and main entrance with large windows and shutters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and partial view of the backyard with trees and hedges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor seating, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool, deck, and the side of the house with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, flanked by large windows and decorative shutters
